title: BEM-932 Block A fix
objective:
Run script:
"""
def write_file(path, text):
    p=Path(path)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))

write_file('governance/reports/BEM932_CLAUDE_AUDIT_ACCEPTED.md', '''# BEM-932 | Claude audit accepted
Status: APPROVED_WITH_CRITICAL_REQUIREMENTS_ACCEPTED
Date: 2026-05-31
Source: Claude external audit for BEM-930 + BEM-931.
Decision: BEM-930 and BEM-931 are accepted as architectural basis. Repository is critically behind the protocol and execution starts with Block A.
Critical requirements accepted:
- Add roadmap dependency matrix.
- Add managed channel trigger policy.
- Add experience-to-behaviour policy.
- Add legacy provider migration policy.
- Start implementation from foundation files, not new protocols.
No issue comments.
''')

write_file('governance/state/protocol_quality_rules.json', '''{
  "version": "1.0",
  "date": "2026-05-31",
  "owner": "OPERATOR/GD",
  "purpose": "Prevent repeated protocol/design errors",
  "rules": [
    {"id":"no_object_prompts","severity":"critical","rule":"Objects GD/DIR/WRK must have passports, never prompts."},
    {"id":"no_telegram_only_protocol","severity":"critical","rule":"Telegram is an operator front, not the system center."},
    {"id":"no_provider_only_protocol","severity":"high","rule":"Provider model is part of contour lifecycle."},
    {"id":"no_abstract_links","severity":"critical","rule":"Every link must state sender, receiver, payload, event and proof."},
    {"id":"no_release_pass_without_sha","severity":"critical","rule":"Release PASS requires non-null CI/Git SHA."},
    {"id":"no_mock_as_production","severity":"critical","rule":"mock_status and production_status must be separate."},
    {"id":"no_local_element_rules_by_default","severity":"high","rule":"Elements inherit role/object/contour rules; no local rules by default."},
    {"id":"no_workspace_on_element","severity":"high","rule":"Workspace belongs to internal contour, not element."},
    {"id":"russian_first","severity":"medium","rule":"Prose in Russian; English only technical identifiers."},
    {"id":"roadmap_requires_depends_on","severity":"critical","rule":"Every roadmap step must have depends_on or explicit phase-order dependency."}
  ]
}
''')

ctx=Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
ctx.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
append='''\n\n## BEM-932 completed | 2026-05-31\nAccepted Claude audit for BEM-930/BEM-931 and implemented Block A foundation.\nCreated: governance/reports/BEM932_CLAUDE_AUDIT_ACCEPTED.md, governance/state/protocol_quality_rules.json, governance/reports/BEM931_BASELINE_INVENTORY.json, governance/state/roadmap_dependencies.json, governance/state/managed_channel_trigger_policy.json, governance/state/experience_to_behaviour_policy.json, governance/state/provider_legacy_migration_policy.json, governance/reports/BEM932_BLOCK_A_PASS.md.\nResult: BLOCK_A_FOUNDATION_PASS. This is foundation only, not full implementation PASS.\nNext: Block B foundation implementation: object_passports, contours_registry, providers_registry, provider policies, validators.\nNo issue comments.\n'''
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore')+append, encoding='utf-8')
else:
    ctx.write_text('# AGENT_CONTEXT\n'+append, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(ctx))
ops_applied.append('BEM-932 Block A foundation artifacts created without imports')
